repo.name: Custom Unmanic Plugins by blackmountainwar
repo.description: Only a single plugin so far: a badly vibecoded audio trancoder that handles .flac and .opus conversion

plugins.author: blackmountainwar
plugins.description: Modifyied official plugin that handles flac and opus transcoding. Listen! This plugin was vibecoded out of the wazoo. I'm not a programmer -- just needed this plugin to convert .flac into .opus so... here we are. Use at your own peril!
plugins.name: Modded Audio Transcoder by blackmountainwar
